persistence.persistence-unit:
} } () -> lessonService.deleteLesson(999L)); assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, when(lessonDao.findById(999L)).thenReturn(null); void shouldThrowExceptionWhenDeletingNonExistentLesson() { @DisplayName("Delete Lesson: Should throw exception when lesson does not exist") @Test } verify(lessonDao).deleteLesson(1L); lessonService.deleteLesson(1L); when(lessonDao.findById(1L)).thenReturn(lesson); LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30), course, "A101"); Lesson lesson = createLesson(1L, LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0), Course course = createCourse(1L, "Math", "#FF0000"); void shouldDeleteLessonWhenExists() { @DisplayName("Delete Lesson: Should delete lesson when it exists") @Test } () -> lessonService.getLessonById(999L)); assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, when(lessonDao.findById(999L)).thenReturn(null); void shouldThrowExceptionWhenLessonNotFound() { @DisplayName("Get Lesson By ID: Should throw exception when lesson not found") @Test } assertEquals(1L, result.getId()); assertNotNull(result); Lesson result = lessonService.getLessonById(1L); when(lessonDao.findById(1L)).thenReturn(lesson); LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30), course, "A101"); Lesson lesson = createLesson(1L, LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0), Course course = createCourse(1L, "Math", "#FF0000"); void shouldReturnLessonById() { @DisplayName("Get Lesson By ID: Should return lesson when found") @Test } assertEquals("A101", result.get(0).getClassroom()); assertEquals(1, result.size()); List result = lessonService.getLessonsByCourse(1L); when(lessonDao.findLessonsByCourse(1L)).thenReturn(Collections.singletonList(lesson)); LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30), course, "A101"); Lesson lesson = createLesson(1L, LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0), Course course = createCourse(1L, "Math", "#FF0000"); void shouldReturnLessonsByCourse() { @DisplayName("Get Lessons By Course: Should return only lessons for given course") @Test } assertEquals(2, result.size()); List result = lessonService.getAllLessons(); when(lessonDao.findAllLessons()).thenReturn(Arrays.asList(lesson1, lesson2)); LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 12, 30), course, "B202"); Lesson lesson2 = createLesson(2L, LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 11, 0), LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30), course, "A101"); Lesson lesson1 = createLesson(1L, LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0), Course course = createCourse(1L, "Math", "#FF0000"); void shouldReturnAllLessons() { @DisplayName("Get All Lessons: Should return lessons sorted by start time") @Test } assertTrue(result.isEmpty()); List result = lessonService.getAllLessons(); when(lessonDao.findAllLessons()).thenReturn(Collections.emptyList()); void shouldReturnEmptyListWhenNoLessons() { @DisplayName("Get All Lessons: Should return empty list when no lessons exist") @Test } () -> lessonService.addLesson(start, end, 1L, " ")); assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, LocalDateTime end = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30); LocalDateTime start = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0); void shouldThrowExceptionWhenClassroomIsBlank() { @DisplayName("Add Lesson: Should throw exception when classroom is blank") @Test } () -> lessonService.addLesson(null, null, null, null)); assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, void shouldThrowExceptionWhenFieldsAreNull() { @DisplayName("Add Lesson: Should throw exception when fields are null") @Test } () -> lessonService.addLesson(start, end, 999L, "A101")); assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, when(lessonDao.findCourseById(999L)).thenReturn(null); LocalDateTime end = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30); LocalDateTime start = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0); void shouldThrowExceptionWhenCourseNotFound() { @DisplayName("Add Lesson: Should throw exception when course not found") @Test } () -> lessonService.addLesson(start, end, 1L, "A101")); assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, LocalDateTime end = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0); LocalDateTime start = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 0); void shouldThrowExceptionWhenEndTimeBeforeStartTime() { @DisplayName("Add Lesson: Should throw exception when end time is before start time") @Test } verify(lessonDao).saveLesson(any(Lesson.class)); assertEquals(course, result.getCourse()); assertEquals("A101", result.getClassroom()); assertNotNull(result); Lesson result = lessonService.addLesson(start, end, 1L, "A101"); when(lessonDao.findCourseById(1L)).thenReturn(course); LocalDateTime end = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 10, 30); LocalDateTime start = LocalDateTime.of(2026, 3, 10, 9, 0); Course course = createCourse(1L, "Math", "#FF0000"); void shouldAddLessonSuccessfully() { @DisplayName("Add Lesson: Should successfully add a lesson when all fields are valid") @Test } return lesson; lesson.setClassroom(classroom); lesson.setCourse(course); lesson.setEndAt(end); lesson.setStartAt(start); lesson.setId(id); Lesson lesson = new Lesson(); private Lesson createLesson(Long id, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, Course course, String classroom) { @DisplayName("Helper Method: Create a Lesson") } return course; course.setColorCode(colorCode); course.setName(name); course.setId(id); Course course = new Course(); private Course createCourse(Long id, String name, String colorCode) { @DisplayName("Helper Method: Create a Course") LessonService lessonService; @InjectMocks LessonDao lessonDao; @Mockclass LessonServiceTest {@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)@DisplayName("Logic Test: LessonService tests with JUnit 5 & Mockito")import static org.mockito.Mockito.*;import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.*;import java.util.List;import java.util.Collections;import java.util.Arrays;import java.time.LocalDateTime;import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;import org.mockito.Mock;import org.mockito.InjectMocks;import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;import org.junit.jupiter.api.DisplayName;import org.entities.Lesson;import org.entities.Course;import org.dao.LessonDao; org.hibernate.jpa.HibernatePersistenceProvider
org.entities.Message org.entities.User org.entities.Course org.entities.Lesson
